title: Level Finance - REKT
relevance_summary: Flash loan followed by multiple referral reward claims in the same epoch

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls claimMultiple() after a flash loan borrow in the same tx

red_flags: Repeated referral reward claims within the same epoch
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that calls claimMultiple() after a flash loan borrow in the same tx
summary: A bug in LevelFinance's LevelReferralControllerV2 contract allowed attackers to repeatedly claim referral rewards using flash loans. A monitoring system could have detected and blocked the flash loan followed by multiple referral reward claims in the same epoch.
